cells.value: AP/LLTM base in TAM (x ship-constr share)
§3a - Per-stream supplier coefficients (feed TAM; $-weighted, gated, non-GFE)

cells.formula: IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!J7:J160)*'POP Corpus'!K7:K160*('POP Corpus'!H7:H160="BC")*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!J7:J160)*'POP Corpus'!K7:K160*('POP Corpus'!H7:H160="BC")*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160*('POP Corpus'!P7:P160+'POP Corpus'!Q7:Q160))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!J7:J160)*'POP Corpus'!K7:K160*('POP Corpus'!H7:H160="BC")*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160))

IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!J7:J160)*'POP Corpus'!K7:K160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!J7:J160)*'POP Corpus'!K7:K160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160*('POP Corpus'!P7:P160+'POP Corpus'!Q7:Q160))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!J7:J160)*'POP Corpus'!K7:K160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160))

IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!J7:J160)*'POP Corpus'!K7:K160*('POP Corpus'!H7:H160="BC")*(1-'POP Corpus'!L7:L160)*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!J7:J160)*'POP Corpus'!K7:K160*('POP Corpus'!H7:H160="BC")*(1-'POP Corpus'!L7:L160)*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160*('POP Corpus'!P7:P160+'POP Corpus'!Q7:Q160))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!J7:J160)*'POP Corpus'!K7:K160*('POP Corpus'!H7:H160="BC")*(1-'POP Corpus'!L7:L160)*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160))

IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!L7:L160)*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!L7:L160)*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160*('POP Corpus'!P7:P160+'POP Corpus'!Q7:Q160))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*(1-'POP Corpus'!L7:L160)*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160))

IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160*('POP Corpus'!P7:P160+'POP Corpus'!Q7:Q160))/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160))
IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160*'POP Corpus'!N7:N160)/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160))
IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160*'POP Corpus'!O7:O160)/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160))
IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160*'POP Corpus'!P7:P160)/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160))
IF(SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160)=0,"",SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160*'POP Corpus'!Q7:Q160)/SUMPRODUCT('POP Corpus'!I7:I160*'POP Corpus'!M7:M160))

cells.value: §3d - Distributed-production view (appendix - broader than commercial TAM)
§4b - Outside-yards POP - disclosed artifact vs MYP-corrected
Travel the POP-coefficient numbers together: disclosed artifact -> MYP-corrected outside-yards -> applied BC coefficient.
Recovery basis: FPDS obligatedAmount + trade-press totals (USNI / Defense Daily).
Per-hull allocation within a master PIID is not disclosed; POP weights are the analytical reconstruction.
AP/LLTM stream (CY AP x share x coeff)
§5e - TAM bridge components (BC base to supplier TAM)

cells.formula: N('TAM Build'!C32)+N('TAM Build'!D32)+N('TAM Build'!E32)+N('TAM Build'!F32)+N('TAM Build'!G32)+N('TAM Build'!H32)
